RFP - DATA ANALYTICS PLATFORM DEVELOPMENT

Contract Agency: Department of Energy (DOE) - Energy Efficiency & Renewable Energy (EERE)

*** KEY DATES ***
Posted: 03-06-2026 (March 6, 2026)
Closing: 15 April, 2026 at 23:59 UTC
Questions Due: April 1st, 2026

I. BACKGROUND AND PURPOSE

The Department of Energy seeks to build a next-generation data analytics platform supporting renewable energy research.

II. SCOPE OF WORK

A. Phase 1: Foundation (Q2-Q3 2026)
   - Requirements gathering
   - Architecture design
   - Technology selection

   B. Phase 2: Development (Q4 2026 - Q2 2027)
   - MVP development
   - Testing and QA
   - Security hardening

   C. Phase 3: Deployment (Q3-Q4 2027)
   - Production deployment
   - Training
   - Operations handoff

III. CONTRACTOR QUALIFICATIONS

Successful contractors must demonstrate:
1. 5+ years building large-scale data platforms
2. Experience with real-time analytics at scale
3. Security clearance eligibility or current clearance
4. Team of 8-12 engineers

IV. TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

MANDATORY:
- Support for 100+ concurrent users
- Query response time < 5 seconds at P95
- Support for both batch and streaming data
- Compliance with NIST cybersecurity framework

OPTIONAL:
- Machine learning capabilities
- Advanced visualization dashboards
- Custom reporting engine

v. PRICING AND CONTRACT TERMS

Contract Type: Cost-Plus-Fixed-Fee (CPFF)
Period of Performance: 24 months
Maximum Obligation: $8.5 million (Government estimate)

VI. PROPOSAL SUBMISSION

All proposals must be received electronically no later than April 15, 2026 @ 11:59 PM EST.

Evaluation will be based on:
* Technical merit (45%)
* Past performance (30%)
* Cost reasonableness (25%)

Questions? Contact RFP.Manager@energy.gov before April 1st, 2026.
